case_title: WONG, KIU FAI et al VS WU, YU TONG et al

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27821, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,762.00 FILED BY WONG, KIU FAI WONG, KE LAN SUN FAI RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT WU, YU TONG CHEN, BING YAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT WU, YU TONG CHEN, BING YAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WU, YU TONG
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WU, YU TONG CHEN, BING YAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, KIU FAI WONG, KE LAN SUN FAI RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, YU TONG CHEN, BING YAN $4,762.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,814.00, DEFENDANT - CHEN, BING YAN WAIVES NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT SHALL BE REDUCES TO $3812.00 AND COSTS OF $52.00 IN THE EVENT DEFENDANTS RETURN WATER DISPENSER TO PLAINTIFF'S NO LATER THAN FEB. 1, 2005. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, KIU FAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, YU TONG $3,277.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,277.00, JUDGEMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27821 ON 3/16/05. EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED", PER JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY P. KAPLAN. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO SUN FAIR RESATAURANT.
